infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AcneTrex uses the camera only when you choose to capture a private FaceAtlas scan.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AcneTrex accesses selected photos only when you choose to add them to FaceAtlas.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AcneTrex uses approximate location while the app is open to provide optional weather context.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AcneTrex to capture a private FaceAtlas scan.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AcneTrex to use approximate location for optional weather context.
